# Step 01 — My Approval Dashboard

**Persona:** Approver (HOD / FC / GM / Owner)
**Module:** 3
**Section:** 3.1
**Route:** `/procurement/approval`
**Parent Flow:** Approver — Review & Approve PR

---

## 1. Access Path

**Sidebar navigation:** Procurement → My Approval

The My Approval page is the dedicated approval dashboard shown immediately after the Approver logs in and navigates to the Procurement module. It lists all purchase requests pending the current approver's action.

---

## 2. Flow Position

```mermaid
graph TD
    myapproval["1. My Approval Dashboard"] --> list["2. PR List"]
    list --> detail["3. PR Detail"]
    detail --> edit["4. Edit Mode - Approved Qty"]
    edit -->|Approve| approved(["PR Approved"])
    edit -->|Reject| rejected(["PR Rejected"])
    edit -->|Send for Review| review(["PR Returned"])
    style myapproval fill:#1a56db,color:#fff,stroke:#1a56db
```

---

## 3. Screen Layout

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ CARMEN  ≡  Procurement › My Approval                   [user ▾] │
├──────────────┬──────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│ My Approval  │  My Approval                                     │
│ Purchase Req │  Review and approve pending procurement requests  │
│ Purchase Ord │                                                   │
│ …            │  ┌────────────────┐  ┌──────────┐  ┌──────────┐ │
│              │  │ Total Pending  │  │ Purchase │  │ Purchase │ │
│              │  │      39        │  │ Order    │  │ Req.     │ │
│              │  │                │  │    0     │  │   39     │ │
│              │  └────────────────┘  └──────────┘  └──────────┘ │
│              │                                                   │
│              │  [Search…]                    [rows per page ▾]  │
│              │                                                   │
│              │  #  Document          Type  Date    Status        │
│              │  1  PR20260400046     …     2026-…  [IN PROGRESS] │
│              │  2  PR20260400045     …     2026-…  [IN PROGRESS] │
│              │  …                                                │
│              │  Showing 1–10 of 39                [< 1 2 3 >]   │
└──────────────┴──────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

---

## 4. Stats Bar

Stats bar counts are **role-specific** — each approver sees only what is pending at their stage.

| Role | Total Pending | Purchase Request | Purchase Order | Store Requisition | Notes |
|------|--------------|-----------------|----------------|-------------------|-------|
| HOD | 39 | 39 | 0 | 0 | Own department only |
| FC | 14 | 6 | 8 | 0 | All departments; includes PO approvals |
| GM | 0 | 0 | 0 | 0 | No items at GM stage in test data |
| Owner | 0 | 0 | 0 | 0 | No items at Owner stage in test data |

> ✅ **Confirmed in UI (2026-04-16):** All four roles verified. FC's queue includes both PR and PO documents — the My Approval list is a **multi-document-type** inbox, not PR-only.

> ⚠️ **Discovery:** GM and Owner test accounts are on a different hotel entity (**ZB02 - ZEBRA (FIFO)**) than HOD/FC (**ZB01 - ZEBRA (AVG)**). This is a test-environment configuration difference. All four roles (FC, GM, Owner) have **org-wide cross-department PR visibility** per FR-PR-009 — no PR scope restriction applies to these roles. No PRs exist at the GM/Owner approval stage in the current ZB01 test data.

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy:** BRD does not describe a "My Approval" dashboard at `/procurement/approval` as a distinct page. FR-PR-009 describes the PR list view at `/procurement/purchase-requests`. The live UI provides a separate approval hub with aggregate stats not mentioned in the BRD.

---

## 5. List Columns

| Column | Type | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| # | Row number | Sequential row index |
| Document | Button (blue text) | PR reference number — clicking opens PR Detail |
| Type | Text | Document type (Purchase Request / Purchase Order / Store Req) |
| Date | Date | PR creation date (YYYY-MM-DD) |
| Status | Badge (orange) | Current workflow status — observed as IN PROGRESS for pending approvals |

---

## 6. Action Buttons

| Button | Location | Color | Enabled When | Behaviour |
|--------|----------|-------|--------------|-----------|
| Document row (PR number) | Table cell | Blue text link | Always | Navigates to PR Detail (step-03) |
| Search | Header | — | Always | Filters list by keyword |
| Rows per page | Header right | — | Always | Changes pagination size |
| Pagination | Footer | — | Always | Navigates between pages |

No row-level action buttons (Approve/Reject/Return) are present in this list. All actions are performed inside the PR Detail view.

> ⚠️ **Discrepancy:** BRD FR-PR-005A states "All three action buttons (Reject, Return, Submit/Approve) visible simultaneously for Approvers". The My Approval list does NOT show action buttons per row. Actions are only accessible from within PR Detail. Impact: approvers must open each PR individually — no bulk approve from list.

---

## 7. Business Rules

| # | Rule | FR Reference |
|---|------|-------------|
| BR-01 | Only PRs at the approver's current workflow stage appear in My Approval | FR-PR-005 |
| BR-02 | HOD sees only their own department's PRs (`procurement.purchase_request.view_department`) | FR-PR-009 |
| BR-03 | FC, GM, Owner see PRs from all departments | FR-PR-009 |
| BR-04 | Stats bar counts reflect real-time pending counts | FR-PR-005 |
| BR-05 | PR number links navigate to the PR detail page | FR-PR-010 |
| BR-06 | FC, GM, and Owner My Approval queues include multiple document types (PR, PO, SR) | FR-PR-005A |
| BR-07 | FC, GM, and Owner have org-wide cross-department visibility; test accounts for GM/Owner happen to be on a different hotel entity (ZB02) in this environment | FR-PR-009 |

---

## 8. Edge Cases

| Scenario | System Behaviour |
|----------|-----------------|
| Approver has 0 pending PRs | Stats bar shows Total Pending = 0; list shows empty state with message "No pending approvals — You have no documents waiting for your approval at the moment." |
| HOD has no department assigned | My Approval list empty (no PRs match department filter) |
| PR is recalled/cancelled while approver views list | On next refresh or navigation, PR disappears from list |
| Approver opens a PR that another approver has already actioned | PR Detail shown in read-only; workflow stage has advanced |
| Very large number of PRs (100+) | Pagination controls appear; default 10 rows per page |
| Approver clicks a PR number that has been deleted | 404 or redirect to PR list |

---

## 9. Navigation

| Action | Destination |
|--------|------------|
| Click PR number (Document column) | step-03 PR Detail |
| Click "Purchase Request" sidebar item | step-02 PR List |
| Click sidebar "My Approval" (already here) | Refreshes current page |

---

## 10. API Endpoints

| Method | Endpoint | Purpose |
|--------|----------|---------|
| GET | `/api/procurement/approval/pending` | Fetch pending approval list + stats |
| GET | `/api/procurement/purchase-request/:id` | Open PR detail from list row |

---
